definition: P0 materialized X_eff = I_peak/(width_chosen_mA * S_peak); on AX ladder width_chosen equals FWHM (XEFF-width audit).
role: Dimensionless ratio composite / canonical Switching coordinate label for ratio language.
allowed_wording: Dimensionless composite X_eff from P0; on this ladder numerically FWHM-width path.
forbidden_wording: X_eff is the best predictor of A vs invD; X_eff explains turnover better than invD.
notes: Primary prediction narrative favors invD per benchmarks — not invalidating X_eff definition.

definition: Operational inverse denominator product consistent with invD = 1/(w·S_peak) reading using joined width and S_peak (see AX-17B dataset columns).
role: Denominator / area-scale proxy; best tested empirical organizer of A among audited Switching coordinates and scaling templates.
allowed_wording: Inverse area-scale / denominator emphasis coordinate; stronger empirical association with A on tested metrics.
forbidden_wording: invD replaces X_eff identically; invD is a fundamental control variable with causal uniqueness.
notes: High collinearity with T_relax — predictive not causal closure.

definition: Relaxation ladder temperature axis used for ordering and T-only baselines.
role: Shared temperature trend control and ordering axis for partial/residual tests.
evidence: AX_18C (T_linear best among listed T-only); AX_19A
allowed_wording: Temperature trend remains essential; best simple baseline T_linear in AX-18C family tested.
forbidden_wording: Temperature is irrelevant because invD subsumes it.
notes: T and invD strongly correlated — dual presentation.

definition: Canonical relaxation observable A (strict AX domain).
role: Primary outcome for cross-module amplitude-scaling tests.

definition: SVD-oriented relaxation amplitude candidate (strict AX domain).
role: Primary outcome alongside A_obs in coordinated audits.
